Container.Name: sms-gateway
Container.Overview: Internal LAN-only webhook-to-SMS gateway for home server notifications from Jellyseerr/Seerr, Jellyfin, Radarr, and Sonarr. The container runs a Deno/Hono API and serves the React admin panel. SMS provider delivery is not implemented yet.

Config.Name: DB_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database file path inside the container.

Config.Name: ADMIN_USERNAME
Config.Description: Initial admin username used only when no users exist.

Config.Name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Initial admin password used only when no users exist. Set before first start, then remove or rotate after bootstrap if desired.

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Set true only when serving behind HTTPS. Keep false for LAN HTTP.

Config.Name: EVENT_BUFFER_MINUTES
Config.Description: In-memory Event Console retention window in minutes. Events are not persisted.

Config.Name: EVENT_BUFFER_MAX
Config.Description: Maximum in-memory Event Console events retained for this container runtime.

Config.Name: SHARED_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional webhook shared secret. When set, webhook requests must include the x-sms-secret header.

Config.Name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
Config.Description: Future Twilio account SID placeholder. Not used by the scaffold yet.

Config.Name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
Config.Description: Future Twilio auth token placeholder. Not used by the scaffold yet.

Config.Name: TWILIO_FROM
Config.Description: Future Twilio sender phone number placeholder.

Config.Name: SMS_TO
Config.Description: Future SMS recipient phone number placeholder.
